title: poa schimperiana
intro: Poa schimperiana, also known as Schimper's meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to the high-altitude plateaus of Ethiopia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa schimperiana are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Poa schimperiana often include infusion, decoction, or tincture, which are used to make tea, poultices, or other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
